criminal_summary.case_numbers_xls: குற்ற எண்:2/2021 (ஏரல் காவல் நிலையம், தூத்துக்குடி மாவட்டம்) / Crime No: 2/2021 (Eral Police Station, Thoothukudi District). Sections: 147, 148, 294(b), 448, 427, 506(ii) Section 4 of TNPHW ACT & 109 IPC. Description: On 27.12.2022 at 17:30, 9 masked persons went to the complainant's house and abused KRM Radhakrishnan, saying "you should not leave your husband without cutting him and killing him", and that the person they were looking for was not there, and they broke and damaged the car, and threatened to kill him, and then left. Charges framed: No.; குற்ற எண்:319/2018 (திசையன்விளை காவல் நிலையம் திருநெல்வேலி மாவட்டம்) / Crime No: 319/2018 (Thisaiyanvilai Police Station, Tirunelveli District). Sections: 147, 448, 294(b), 323, 364, 506(ii) TNPPDL Act (Prevention of Damage and loss) Act, 1992, and 147, 449, 294(b), 323, 364, 302, 506(ii) 25 பிரிவுகள் & 3 of TNPPDL Act @ 147, 449, 294(b), 323, 364, 302, 201, 120(b), 506(ii) IPC and of TNPPDL Act @ 120(b), 147, 148, 149, 294(b), 323, 364, 427, 506(ii), 450, 302, r/w 201, and 109 IPC. Description: A case has been registered for kidnapping and murdering a woman who worked for him, after Santoshraj threatened her to love him. Charges framed: Yes, on 12.07.2024.; Row HS 255/2011 (ஆறுமுகநேரி காவல் நிலையம், தூத்துக்குடி மாவட்டம்) / Row HS 255/2011 (Arumuganeri Police Station, Thoothukudi District). Sections: As per PSO - Record in the Arumuganeri Police Station. Description: Arumuganeri Police Record of Habitual Violent. Charges framed: Not applicable.
